mapper.select:
SELECT violation_id, event_id, plate_number, violation_type, image_url, src_image_url, fine_status, needs_review, speed_kmh, TO_CHAR(detected_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS detected_at FROM violation_log
ORDER BY detected_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT violation_id, event_id, plate_number, violation_type, image_url, src_image_url, fine_status, needs_review, speed_kmh, TO_CHAR(detected_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS detected_at FROM violation_log WHERE violation_id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO violation_log (event_id, plate_number, violation_type, image_url, src_image_url, speed_kmh, fine_status, needs_review) VALUES (#{eventId}, #{plateNumber}, #{violationType}, #{imageUrl}, #{srcImageUrl}, #{speedKmh}, #{fineStatus}, #{needsReview}) ON CONFLICT (event_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.update: UPDATE violation_log SET fine_status = #{status} WHERE violation_id = #{id}
UPDATE violation_log SET plate_number = #{plateNumber}, violation_type = #{violationType}, fine_status = #{fineStatus}, needs_review = true WHERE violation_id = #{violationId}
